name: WARCRAFT - RPG
description:
Warcraft is a universe too big for the AI to understand completely, this is an attempt to condense the idea of the world, without setting too many parameters the AI will not remember.

v1.4 Updated 12-09-2025

Shoutout to @Gallicus for creating "World of Warcraft Rpg", while his is more complex and ground to MMORPG rules, mine will be a bit more loosely based solely for story-making.
creator: Rocce
